THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, DENIA A. MEJIA $1,570.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
